training_status: lifts consistently 3 years, 4-6 days per week, 5'3" height

benefits.description: Client lost 14 pounds over 12 weeks (from 143 to 129 lbs), after struggling with traditional calorie deficit and cardio. Very happy with results.

protocol_notes: Commenter is a coach. Female client, 5'3", started at 143 lbs at week 1, currently 129 lbs at week 12. Lifting consistently for 3 years, 4-6 days per week. Started at 0.25 mg and titrated up to current 1 mg weekly. Client plans to continue for another 12 weeks before considering adding other compounds. Commenter also mentions another client who did not tolerate semaglutide well, possibly due to starting at extremely high dose.
